name: graph-lift sweep — issue2pr cross-repo — lora best 1-hop (alpha=0.25)
hypothesis: Is the training-free graph lift a tuned knife-edge or a plateau across (alpha, hops), and can multi-hop rescue diff->affected-test or is it structure-bound?
leakage_checks: references scrubbed; train repos disjoint from test repos.
gold (issue,fixing-PR) edges excluded from aggregation (no leakage).
lift positive across alpha in [0,0.75]; 1 hop == 2 hops (graph-sweep-results.json) — robust plateau, not a tuned point.
known_limitations: pilot scale; TRAINING-FREE mean aggregation (no learned weights); single cross-repo split; exploratory sweep, not release evidence.
